MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. THOMAS S. BROWN, ESQ. of Foley & Lardner LLP, Tel No. 415-434-4484 appearing for Plaintiff Chinese Community Health Care Association;
Atty. ANDREW D. LANPHERE, ESQ. of Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP, Tel No. 415-983-1000 appearing for Defendant Chinese Community Health Plan.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT CHINESE COMMUNITY HEALTH PLAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, the Plan's demurrer to the first six causes of action in the first amended complaint is overruled. All six claims are adequately pled. None of the six claims necessarily depends on the MSA or IPA's physician agreements being construed to preclude the Plan from contacting physicians for the purpose of entering into agreements with those physicians or actually entering into any agreements with those physicians. The IPA has alleged independently wrongful conduct by the Plan in the form of alleged fraudulent statements made by the Plan. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
